title: Kenya Airways Financial Restructuring and Debt Resolution
description: Directs Kenya Airways to implement a comprehensive financial restructuring plan including debt-to-equity conversion with lenders, fleet rationalisation, and route network optimisation to achieve financial sustainability by FY2026.
notes: Debt restructuring negotiations with KQ Lenders Group ongoing. Fleet reduced from 44 to 38 aircraft. Route network optimised with exit from 6 loss-making routes.

title: Kenya Power System Loss Reduction Programme
description: Requires Kenya Power to reduce system losses from 23% to 18% by December 2026 through smart metering rollout, distribution network upgrades, and enhanced revenue protection measures. Quarterly progress reporting to National Treasury required.
notes: Smart metering rollout commenced in Nairobi CBD. 120,000 smart meters installed to date against target of 500,000 by end 2025. System losses reduced to 21.5% as at Q3 2024.

title: KRA Revenue Mobilisation — Medium Term Revenue Strategy
description: Directs KRA to implement the Medium Term Revenue Strategy targeting revenue collection of KES 3 trillion by FY2026/27, through expansion of the tax base, digital tax administration, and enhanced compliance enforcement.
notes: FY2024 collection of KES 2.52 trillion exceeded target. iTax platform expanded to cover 95% of taxpayers. Informal sector taxation pilot launched in Nairobi and Mombasa.

title: KPA Port of Mombasa Capacity Expansion and Efficiency
description: Directs KPA to implement the Port of Mombasa Master Plan Phase 2, targeting container handling capacity of 2.5 million TEUs by 2027, and to reduce average vessel turnaround time from 4.2 days to 2.5 days.
notes: Berth 22 and 23 construction at 65% completion. Container yard expansion Phase 1 complete. Vessel turnaround time improved to 3.8 days as at Q3 2024.

title: NSSF Act 2023 Implementation and Member Communication
description: Directs NSSF to implement the NSSF Act 2023 contribution framework, develop a comprehensive member communication strategy, and establish a dispute resolution mechanism for employers challenging the new contribution rates.
notes: NSSF Act 2023 implementation facing legal challenges. Court of Appeal ruling awaited. NSSF has developed member communication materials and employer engagement programme.

title: KDB Lending Targets — Bottom-Up Economic Transformation Agenda
description: Directs KDB to align its lending portfolio with the Bottom-Up Economic Transformation Agenda (BETA), targeting 40% of new loans to MSMEs, 25% to agribusiness, and 20% to affordable housing by FY2026.
notes: FY2024 MSME lending at 35% of portfolio. Agribusiness at 22%. Affordable housing product launched Q3 2024 with KES 2 billion initial allocation.
